result.preview:

Did you mean "julian"?

LINE 9: ORDER BY AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate...
                     ^"

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM o.ContractID__c) = TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.Id)
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01'
  AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate)) ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM o.ContractID__c) = TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.Id)
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01'
  AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY AVG(julianday(c.CompanySignedDate) - julianday(o.CreatedDate)) ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01'
  AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY AVG(DATEDIFF('day', o.CreatedDate, c.CompanySignedDate)) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01'
  AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY AVG(DATEDIFF('day', o.CreatedDate, c.CompanySignedDate)) ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01'
  AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY AVG(DATEDIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId

JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(o.ContractID__c, '#', '') = REPLACE(c.Id, '#', '')
WHERE o.CreatedDate >= '2023-04-01'
  AND o.CreatedDate < '2023-05-01'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY AVG(DATEDIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) ASC
LIMIT 1;
